title: 5 Dogfood Fixes

GAP-058.details: Detected 'python (backend/pyproject.toml)' and 'node (frontend/package.json)' from KFS repo. Fixed str->Path coercion bug. Added subdirectory-level and file-extension-inferred tech stack detection for monorepo layouts.

GAP-059.details: Loaded 1 memory source (MEMORY.md), extracted 1 locked decision and active projects table. Scans CWD, target_dir, and ~/.claude/projects/ subdirectories.

GAP-060.details: Architecture prompt includes codebase_summary, locked_decisions, and MODIFICATIONS-not-replacements language.

GAP-061.details: Cost calibration ($0.01/$0.05/$0.20 tiers) present in planner prompt. Clarifies these are LLM costs, not human costs.

GAP-062.details: Planner prompt includes 'corresponding test' rule and references tests/ directory convention.

bugs_found_and_fixed: GAP-058: _scan_codebase(target_dir: Path) crashed with AttributeError when passed a str -- added str->Path coercion
GAP-058: Tech stack detection missed monorepo layouts (package files in subdirs) -- added one-level-deep fallback and file-extension inference
